zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Perigord於1018年出生在法國培利格德時，她的父親Albert de Périgord26歲，母親Amelie Razes34歲。她於1041年與Geoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blaye在法國阿奎泰吉洛德布萊也布萊也結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1076年在法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯吉洛德爾享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Perigord于1018年出生在法国培利格德时，她的父亲Albert de Périgord26岁，母亲Amelie Razes34岁。她于1041年与Geoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blaye在法国阿奎泰吉洛德布萊也布萊也结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1076年在法国哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯吉洛德爾享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Perigord was born in 1018, in Périgord, France, her father, Albert de Périgord, was 26 and her mother, Amelie Razes, was 34. She married Geoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blaye in 1041, in Blaye, Blaye, Gironde, Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1076, in Girondelle, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Perigord est née en 1018, à Périgord, France, son père, Albert de Périgord, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Amelie Razes, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Geoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blaye en 1041, à Blaye, Blaye, Gironde, Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1076, à Girondelle, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Perigord 1018 in Périgord, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Albert de Périgord 26 und ihre Mutter Amelie Razes 34. Sie hat 1041 in Blaye, Blaye, Gironde, Aquitaine, Frankreich Geoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blaye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1076 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Girondelle, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Perigord è nata il nel 1018 nel Périgord, Francia, sua padre, Albert de Périgord, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Amelie Razes, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Geoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blaye nel 1041, nel Blaye, Blaye, Gironde, Aquitaine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1076, nel Girondelle, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Perigordが1018年にフランスプeリゴルドで生まれた時，父Albert de Périgordは26歳，母Amelie Razesは34歳であった。1041年にフランスアクイティアインギロンドブレイブレイでGeoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blayeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1076年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスギロンデルで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Perigord(이)가 1018년 프랑스 pe리고드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Albert de Périgord(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Amelie Razes(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1041년 프랑스 아키테인 지론드 블레이 블레이에서 Geoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blaye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1076년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 아데네스 지론들에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Perigord nasceu em 1018, em Périgord, França, seu pai, Albert de Périgord, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Amelie Razes, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Geoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blaye em 1041, em Blaye, Blaye, Gironde, Aquitaine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1076, em Girondelle, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, França, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Perigord родилась в 1018 г. в местности пeригорд, Франция, её отцу по имени Albert de Périgord было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Amelie Razes, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blaye в 1041 г. в местности блеи, блеи, гиронд, аквитеин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1076 г. в местности гиронделл, арденнесь, чампагне-арденн, Франция в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Perigord nació en 1018, en Périgord, Francia, su papá, Albert de Périgord, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Amelie Razes, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Geoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blaye en 1041, en Blaye, Blaye, Gironde, Aquitaine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1076, en Girondelle, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, a la edad de 58 años.
